name: flink-reactor
description: VS Code support for FlinkReactor — synthesis-backed diagnostics, ts-plugin auto-configuration, and one-step onboarding for TSX Flink pipelines
author: Ahmed El.Hussaini <328866+sandboxws@users.noreply.github.com>

flinkReactor.enable.markdownDescription: Master switch for the FlinkReactor language server. When disabled, the server publishes no diagnostics.

flinkReactor.diagnostics.enable.markdownDescription: Publish synthesis-backed diagnostics (`FR*` codes) for pipeline files.

flinkReactor.server.debounce.markdownDescription: Debounce window (ms) after the last edit before re-synthesizing a pipeline.

flinkReactor.server.maxHeapMb.markdownDescription: Heap ceiling (MB) for the synthesis isolation worker.

flinkReactor.flinkVersion.markdownDescription: Target Flink version override. The DSL default applies when unset.

enumDescriptions: Never edit tsconfig.json (use the explicit command instead)
flinkReactor.tsPlugin.autoConfigure.markdownDescription: How to ensure `@flink-reactor/ts-plugin` is configured in the project `tsconfig.json`.

flinkReactor.cliPath.markdownDescription: Path to the `flink-reactor` CLI. Resolved from the workspace when empty. Reserved for CLI-lifecycle integration.

enumDescriptions: Both layers: the TextMate grammar colors instantly/offline and the language server's semantic tokens refine it (recommended).
TextMate grammar only — fast, offline, heuristic; no server semantic tokens for embedded SQL.
Language-server semantic tokens only — precise, synthesis-aware; the heuristic grammar coloring is suppressed.
No embedded-SQL coloring — fragments render as ordinary TypeScript string literals.
flinkReactor.sql.highlighting.markdownDescription: How to color the Flink SQL embedded in `.tsx` pipeline props (`Filter` `condition`, `Map`/`Aggregate` projections, join `on`, `Validate` rules, `Schema` watermark, `RawSQL` body). Two complementary layers — a TextMate injection grammar and language-server semantic tokens — that compose: semantic tokens override the grammar within the ranges the server reports.

flinkReactor.inlayHints.enabled.markdownDescription: Master switch for FlinkReactor's synthesis-backed inlay hints. When off, no per-component schema/changelog/parallelism annotations are shown (TypeScript's own inlay hints are unaffected).

enumDescriptions: No schema fact in the hint.
The inferred output column count (e.g. `5 cols`).
An inline column-name list (e.g. `[user_id, amount, ts]`), falling back to a count for wide schemas.
flinkReactor.inlayHints.schema.markdownDescription: How each component's inferred output schema renders in its inlay hint. Hovering the hint always expands to the full `column | TYPE` schema, regardless of mode.

flinkReactor.inlayHints.changelogMode.markdownDescription: Show each component's resolved changelog mode (`append`/`retract`/`upsert`) in its inlay hint.

flinkReactor.inlayHints.parallelism.markdownDescription: Show the resolved effective parallelism (`p=4`) in each component's inlay hint. The tooltip notes which cascade level set it (Pipeline prop > env override > config > default).

flinkReactor.inlayHints.windowColumns.markdownDescription: Annotate window components (`TumbleWindow`/`SlideWindow`/`SessionWindow`) with the `window_start`/`window_end` time columns windowing injects into the downstream schema.

flinkReactor.inlayHints.joinColumns.markdownDescription: Annotate join components with the merged (deduplicated) resulting column count of their output schema.

flinkReactor.gateway.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable opt-in **deep validation** against a Flink SQL Gateway: the *Deep Validate Pipeline* command (and optionally save) submits the synthesized SQL via `EXPLAIN` and surfaces planner errors (missing catalog tables, type mismatches, unregistered UDFs) as `FR-GATEWAY-` diagnostics. Requires a reachable gateway — nothing connects while this is off.

flinkReactor.gateway.endpoint.markdownDescription: Base URL of the Flink SQL Gateway REST endpoint (e.g. `http://localhost:8083`). Required when `flinkReactor.gateway.enabled` is on.

flinkReactor.gateway.validateOnSave.markdownDescription: Run a deep-validation pass each time a pipeline `.tsx` is saved (never on keystrokes). The SQL-hash cache makes saves that don't change the generated SQL free.

flinkReactor.gateway.timeoutMs.markdownDescription: Wall-clock budget (ms) for one whole deep-validation pass; on expiry the pass is abandoned with a notice and authoring continues.

flinkReactor.gateway.flinkVersion.markdownDescription: Optional hint of the gateway's Flink version. A mismatch with the pipeline's target logs a warning (EXPLAIN is generally forward-compatible); it never fails the pass.

flinkReactor.consoleUrl.markdownDescription: FlinkReactor Console URL tap manifests push to (mirrors `fr synth --console-url`). Shown in the Pipeline Taps panel; leave empty when no console is configured.

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with FlinkReactor
walkthroughs.description: Configure the ts-plugin, switch to your workspace TypeScript, and open your first pipeline.

steps.title: Configure the ts-plugin
steps.description:
FlinkReactor's editor intelligence is delivered by `@flink-reactor/ts-plugin`. Add it to your `tsconfig.json`.
[Configure ts-plugin](command:flinkReactor.configureTsPlugin)

steps.title: Use your workspace TypeScript
steps.description:
VS Code's bundled TypeScript will not load workspace plugins. Switch to the workspace version so the ts-plugin activates.
[Use Workspace TypeScript](command:flinkReactor.useWorkspaceTypeScript)

steps.title: Open a pipeline
steps.description: Pipelines live in `pipelines/<name>/index.tsx`. Open one to see live diagnostics from the FlinkReactor language server.

steps.title: Next steps
steps.description: Synthesize SQL and CRDs from the terminal with `flink-reactor synth`, and explore the docs.

scripts.pretest: pnpm run compile-tests && pnpm run build && pnpm run prepare-server
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && tsc -p src/graph/webview/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p src/preview/webview/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p src/preview/crd-webview/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p src/taps/webview/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.package: pnpm run build && pnpm run prepare-server && vsce package --no-dependencies
scripts.vscode:prepublish: pnpm run build && pnpm run prepare-server
